verifiedFlow.message: [Vote Restart] Bot_votebot started a restart vote! /voteyes to agree. (1/1, 120s remaining)
[Vote Restart] Vote passed! (1/1) Server will restart in 300s.
[Vote Restart] Vote passed! Server restarting in 295s.

notes: Live command and cronjob logs showed POST /gameserver/player/search during both the voterestart command and the check-vote cronjob, exercising getOnlineNonImmunePlayers() on the real Paper server.
The pagination-specific >100-player path remains covered by automated integration tests; live Paper verification here confirms the changed runtime path still works end-to-end with real bots.
